case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. GUILLERMO CARDIEL OROZCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OROZCO, GUILLERMO CARDIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DIANA PERDOMO--SENIOR COSTUMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OROZCO, GUILLERMO CARDIEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,680.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT OROZCO, GUILLERMO CARDIEL
